title: leucojum autumnale var. oporanthum
intro: Leucojum autumnale var. oporanthum, also known as autumn-flowering leucojum, is a type of flowering bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative and anxiolytic. The health benefits associated with Leucojum autumnale var. oporanthum include its potential to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, as well as its possible role in reducing inflammation. Leucojum autumnale var. oporanthum is typically prepared as a tincture or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
